title: potentilla anserina subvar. incisa
intro: Potentilla anserina subvar. incisa, also known as Silver Buffaloberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties that can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory problems, diarrhea, and skin irritations, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Potentilla anserina subvar. incisa can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
